name: morph-claude-code-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin that intercepts context compaction with Morph

scripts.build:all: bun build --compile src/proxy.ts --outfile bin/morph-proxy-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/proxy.ts --outfile bin/morph-proxy-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/proxy.ts --outfile bin/morph-proxy-linux-x64
